_comment_permissions: Every command is broadcaster-only by default — viewers can't fire it. Add 'allow' to widen access: 'anyone', 'subscriber', 'vip', or 'mod'. Each tier implicitly grants higher tiers (mod includes vip+sub+broadcaster). 'allow':'anyone' is the only value that makes a command public.
_comment_redeem_alias: Use 'redeem' instead of 'effect' to make a chat command fire the same flow a real channel-point redemption would. The value must EXACTLY match the rewardTitle key in redeems.json (case, spaces, exclamation marks all count). Note: chat aliases never deduct channel points (Twitch's API doesn't allow that for any app); use 'allow':'mod' or omit it (broadcaster-only) to keep it from being a free bypass.
_comment_random_sound: sound:'*' picks any uploaded sound from assets/sounds/. sound:['a.wav','b.wav'] picks from that exact list. Pair with effect:'play-sound' to skip the visual entirely (useful for soundboards / 'out of context' style commands).
_comment: Add more chat commands here. Key = the exact command starting with !.
